title: Smoked Peach BBQ Chicken
description: A twist on traditional BBQ with smoky roasted chicken and sweet peaches. Perfect for summer gatherings.
instructions: Season chicken with smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Grill chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add sliced peaches and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until caramelized.
In a small bowl, whisk together brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, and a pinch of salt.
Brush the peach glaze over the grilled chicken.
Serve chicken with roasted peaches and additional peach glaze on the side.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
